change.final_action: Rejected and code change reverted after prompt verifier failed.
change.summary: Candidate changed scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py default --graph-steps-per-replay from 1 to 2, halving graph launches for 128-token decode windows when divisibility holds.

checks.name: focused tests
checks.result: py_compile passed; invalid 512/127 workload failed divisibility validation under candidate default graph_steps_per_replay=2.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: 512/128 stable final ID changed 220 -> 148536; 4K/128 ID stayed 570; memory stayed flat; candidate primary min decode 114.692653 tok/s.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: Deterministic output changed on 512/128 and decode regressed versus retained decode-policy cache baseline.

commands.focused_tests:
python3 -m py_compile scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py && python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, sys
cmd = [sys.executable, 'scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py', '--engine', 'gguf', '--workloads', '512/127', '--measured-runs', '1']
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
assert proc.returncode != 0
assert 'must be divisible by --graph-steps-per-replay' in (proc.stderr + proc.stdout)
PY
commands.guard: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_repack.py tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_q6_k_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_gemv_decode_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q
commands.primary: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py --engine gguf --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_S.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_s --workloads 512/128 4K/128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-tuning-gpu1-acceptance.json

hardware: GPU1 AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 (24GB class)
notes: The 128K/128 final promotion check was not run because the primary correctness/prompt verifier failed.
This confirms multi-step GGUF graph replay is not a safe default with the current capture because some decode arguments are captured for fixed positions/context lengths.
software: TheRock ROCm 7.13; /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12; cached hipcc builds via /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt
